specific_question: What were the October 2024 conversion rates of leads from general advertising as opposed to leads from automobile review websites?
answer: An October 2024 sales analysis identified that leads from automotive review websites converted at 31%, compared to 19% from general advertising.
dr_question: If Elexion Automotive shifts from dealership franchising to a direct-to-customer sales model, how could it capture the benefits of the transition to drive sales and higher margins in 2027?
